Package microui.core

Class AbstractButton

java.lang.Object
microui.core.base.View
microui.core.base.SpatialView
microui.core.base.ContentView
microui.core.base.Component
microui.core.AbstractButton
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visible
Direct Known Subclasses:
Button, CheckBox
public abstract class AbstractButton extends Component
Abstract base class for all button-like components.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractButton

      public AbstractButton(float x, float y, float w, float h)
      Constructs an AbstractButton with specified position and dimensions. Initializes with default theme styling.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the button's top-left corner
      y - the y-coordinate of the button's top-left corner
      w - the width of the button
      h - the height of the button

  • Method Details

    • getStrokeWeight

      public final float getStrokeWeight()
      Gets the stroke weight (border thickness) of the button.
      Returns:
      the current stroke weight

      public final AbstractButton setStrokeWeight(int weight)

      Returns:
